accessibility.elevators: Priority elevators are located near Entry Gates A, C, and E.
accessibility.accessible_seating: Wheelchair spaces are distributed across all levels, primarily sections 102, 220, and 305.
accessibility.accessible_restrooms: Gender-neutral accessible toilets with grab bars are adjacent to every section.
accessibility.sensory_room: The Sensory Room is located on Level 2, Suite 2A, equipped with noise-canceling headphones.
accessibility.quiet_route_hint: Gate C is recommended as the quietest and widest entrance.
accessibility.vision_support: Tactile pathways and Braille signage from the transit hub to the seats.
accessibility.assistive_listening: FM assistive listening receivers are available at Guest Services on Level 1.

services.water: Drinking fountains and bottle refill stations are at Sections 105, 122, and 204.
services.first_aid: First Aid stations are open on Level 1 near Section 112 and Level 3 near Section 318.
services.nursing_room: Dedicated nursing suite with changing tables is located near Section 130.

gates.name: Verizon Gate
gates.notes: Elevators to all levels available inside.

accessibility.elevators: Public elevators are accessible near the Verizon, Pepsi, and MetLife gates.
accessibility.accessible_seating: Dedicated platforms with Companion seats are located in Sections 109, 142, and 224.
accessibility.accessible_restrooms: All public restrooms are accessible. Family restrooms are available on every concourse.
accessibility.sensory_room: Sensory Lounge is located on the Plaza level near Section 117.
accessibility.quiet_route_hint: Pepsi Gate is generally less crowded and offers a wider, step-free access path.
accessibility.vision_support: Audio descriptive commentary devices can be checked out at Guest Services.
accessibility.assistive_listening: Infrared assistive listening systems are available in the stadium bowl.

services.water: Refillable water stations are located near all major concession stands.
services.first_aid: First Aid locations are near Section 103, 201, and 315.
services.nursing_room: Nursing mother rooms are situated on the Plaza level near the Pepsi Gate.

accessibility.elevators: Elevators are available for VIP and accessible ticket holders inside Gate 1.
accessibility.accessible_seating: Designated spaces are located in the lower ring and special platforms.
accessibility.accessible_restrooms: Accessible restrooms are available near primary seating areas.
accessibility.sensory_room: No permanent sensory room available; sensory kits can be requested.
accessibility.quiet_route_hint: Gate 1 offers the most direct step-free path.

services.first_aid: First Aid stations near Section 105 and 202.
services.nursing_room: Family room available near the main entrance lobby.
